name: vecfleet-automation-test
description: Suite de tests automatizados para la API de VecFleet usando Newman

scripts.test:vec-dev: newman run collections/vecfleet-api.postman_collection.json -e environments/vec-dev.postman_environment.json --reporters cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/vec-dev.html --reporter-htmlextra-title 'VecFleet API - Vec Dev'
scripts.test:vec-hotfix: newman run collections/vecfleet-api.postman_collection.json -e environments/vec-hotfix.postman_environment.json --reporters cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/vec-hotfix.html --reporter-htmlextra-title 'VecFleet API - VEC Hotfix'
scripts.test:dinant: newman run collections/vecfleet-api.postman_collection.json -e environments/dinant-test.postman_environment.json --reporters cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/dinant-test.html --reporter-htmlextra-title 'VecFleet API - Dinant Test'
scripts.test:teco: newman run collections/vecfleet-api.postman_collection.json -e environments/teco-test.postman_environment.json --reporters cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/teco-test.html --reporter-htmlextra-title 'VecFleet API - Teco Test'
